coverage.criterion: Page load — no Unexpected token < in JSON console error from loadCategoriesForKeywordMappings
coverage.notes: T-0001/T-0002 eliminate HTML blind-parse at service and API layers; T-0003 optional UI guard avoids console.error on expected misconfiguration; T-0004 manual smoke (checklist item 2).

coverage.criterion: GET /api/categories returns { success: true, categories: [...] } or structured { success: false, error: actionable message }
coverage.notes: T-0002 primary owner; T-0001 supplies FireflyException messages; T-0004 verifies healthy, bad URL, invalid PAT, and empty categories paths.

coverage.criterion: FireflyService.getCategories() sends Accept: application/json and validates content-type before parsing JSON
coverage.notes: T-0001 explicit requirements 1–5 per DEC-0005 pattern C; T-0004 indirect verification via bad-URL and invalid-PAT scenarios.

coverage.criterion: Keyword-mapping and account-mapping category select elements populate when Firefly returns categories
coverage.notes: T-0001/T-0002 restore successful category fetch; T-0003 preserves populate-on-success behavior; T-0004 manual smoke (checklist item 1).

optional_tasks.rationale: AC-1 and AC-4 satisfied by T-0001/T-0002 alone; T-0003 is optional UI polish per architecture # BUG-0001 and sprint scope.
